meaning: n.休息,睡眠,静止vt.使休息,寄托于vi.休息,长眠,静卧,建立于,座落,依靠
examples: He had a still, almost blank face in repose.
I prayed for the repose of his soul.
After some seconds of repose she set out again.
Whether in flight or in repose, they appear to be choreographing their own lives.
Kennedy lay in repose Thursday evening after his flag-draped casket arrived at the John F.
